name: Terraform Cloud
description: This app integrates with Terraform Cloud to perform generic and investigative actions to manage runs, plans, and applies

parameters.name: organization_name
parameters.description: Name of the organization to list the workspaces of

parameters.name: page_num
parameters.description: Page number of workspace list

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of workspaces to return per page (100 is default)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Name of the organization to list the workspaces of

parameters.name: page_num
parameters.description: Page number of runs returned

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of runs to return per page (20 is default)

actions.name: Create Run
actions.description: Create a run which will perform a plan and apply

parameters.name: workspace_id
parameters.description: ID of workspace where the run will be executed

parameters.name: configuration_version
parameters.description: Configuration version to use for this run. If blank, latest config is used

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message to be associated with this run
parameters.default: Queued manually via the Terraform Enterprise API

parameters.name: is_destroy
parameters.description: Specify if this plan is a destroy plan, which will destroy all provisioned resources

parameters.name: organization_name
parameters.description: Name of the organization to create the workspace within Terraform

parameters.name: workspace_name
parameters.description: Name of the workspace

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description for the workspace

parameters.name: vcs_repo_id
parameters.description: Reference to your VSC repo in the format :org/:repo

parameters.name: vcs_token_id
parameters.description: Token ID of the VSC repo

parameters.name: file_triggers_enabled
parameters.description: Whether to filter runs based on the changed files in a VCS push

parameters.name: auto_apply
parameters.description: Automatically apply changes when plan is successful

parameters.name: queue_all_runs
parameters.description: Whether runs should be queued immediately after workspace creation

actions.name: Apply Run
actions.description: Applies a run that is paused waiting for confirmation after a plan

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the run to apply

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: An optional comment about the run

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the apply to show

actions.name: Get Plan
actions.description: Get details and status of the plan of a run in Terraform

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the plan to show

actions.name: Get Run
actions.description: This endpoint is used for showing details of a specific run

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the run to retrieve details

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the workspace to show

parameters.name: organization_name
parameters.description: The name of the organization to retrieve workspace details

parameters.name: workspace_name
parameters.description: The name of the workspace to retrieve details
